name: Capstone Copper Corp.
analysis: CSC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$15.5800, stop A$12.6522, target A$17.8300 (0.77:1) — then trail it.
